case_title: PATEL, SURESH DBA POST HOTEL VS. GMIYA SOUFIAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SURESH DBA POST HOTEL SERVED JUL-29-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUFIAN, GMIYA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION RE: DAILY RATE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUFIAN, GMIYA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SOUFIAN, GMIYA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SOUFIAN, GMIYA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SURESH DBA POST HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT SOUFIAN, GMIYA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
